name: Asus Prime X870-P CSM Wifi
highlights: ASUS PRIME X870-P WIFI-CSM is an advanced ATX motherboard designed for AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors on the AM5 socket, featuring next-gen DDR5 memory support up to 8000+ MT/s (OC), PCIe 5
2 slots, USB4® connectivity, Wi-Fi 7, and Realtek 2
Packed with ASUS Q-Design, Aura Sync RGB, and robust thermal solutions, it delivers peak performance, expandability, and DIY convenience for gamers, creators, and professionals alike
